name: Electricae
display_name: Electricae — 31M with First Footfall, icy worlds
description: Electricae Pluma and Radialem. Base 6,284,600 cr, with first footfall ×5 = 31,423,000 cr. Only on ICY worlds with very cold Helium/Neon atmosphere. Electricae Radialem spawns only within ~100 ly of a nebula.
display_name_en: Electricae — 31M with First Footfall, icy worlds
description_en: Electricae Pluma and Radialem. Base 6,284,600 cr, with first footfall ×5 = 31,423,000 cr. Only on ICY worlds with very cold Helium/Neon atmosphere. Electricae Radialem spawns only within ~100 ly of a nebula.
description_ru: Electricae Pluma и Radialem. База 6,284,600 cr, с first footfall ×5 = 31,423,000 cr. Только ICY worlds с очень холодной атмосферой Helium/Neon. Electricae Radialem спавнится только в радиусе ~100 ly от туманности.
